prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: title or setup background for a fantasy tactics game world brand
Primary request: create a Renations-wide backdrop based on the composition idea of art/titleconcept.jpg
Scene/background: a view of Earth from space against a deep black-blue void, with the planet dominating the upper frame and the lower frame left mostly open for title treatment
Subject: the globe should feel recognizably Earth-like, but one half is consumed by nuclear winter, ash storms, gray cloud mass, and dim cold haze, while the other half retains clearer blue oceans and bright cloud bands
Style/medium: painterly pixel-art-inspired 2D key background, moody but iconic, blending late-90s strategy RPG atmosphere with a clean title-screen read rather than photoreal NASA imagery
Composition/framing: wide 16:9 composition, the Earth cropped large across the top like the reference image, generous negative space below, no landscape foreground, no characters
Lighting/mood: solemn planetary-scale catastrophe, cold starlit darkness with restrained blue-white glow and ashen storm pall over the damaged half
Color palette: deep navy, space black, polar white, ocean blue, ash gray, smoke violet, muted steel, faint ember-brown within storm bands only if needed
Materials/textures: cloud swirls, ash veils, storm fronts, atmospheric limb glow, painterly pixel texture
Quality: high
Constraints: no text, no logo, no UI, no satellites, no spaceships, no futuristic city lights, no photoreal Earth photo look, no glossy sci-fi poster effects; keep it clean enough for title or setup overlay use
Avoid: modern NASA-photo realism, neon sci-fi, cluttered starfields, cartoon apocalypse imagery, excessive lens flare

Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: primary game title lockup for a fantasy tactics RPG
Primary request: create a readable transparent logo for RENATIONS TACTICS
Subject: RENATIONS as the dominant wordmark with TACTICS integrated as a smaller but still clear companion line or lockup, forming one complete game title
Style/medium: premium logo design for a dark fantasy tactics game, transparent background, vector-friendly silhouette feel, elegant serif letterforms with martial restraint and faint ecclesiastical influence
Composition/framing: centered standalone title lockup, horizontal preferred, balanced for use over dark backdrops and setup screens, readable at medium and large sizes
Lighting/mood: high-contrast ivory or pale stone lettering with restrained brass and dark wine accents, stately and severe, not washed out
Color palette: ivory, pale gold, worn brass, dark wine, muted stone
Quality: high
Constraints: transparent background, no scenery, no mockup, no beta ribbon, no subtitle other than TACTICS, no heavy bevel chrome, no soft glow haze that hurts readability, no overcomplicated crest unless extremely restrained
Avoid: sci-fi logo, esports branding, cartoon fantasy, calligraphy overload, low-contrast pale-on-pale rendering, photoreal metal texture
